items.title: Home Discovery Platform Initiative
items.description: Home Discovery Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Successful housing decision rate and Qualified demand GMV influence, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Homepage. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase successful housing decision rate by strengthening homepage and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase search efficiency by strengthening homepage and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase qualified demand gmv influence by strengthening homepage and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Homepage with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Unified B2C Web Shell with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Search Engine Results Page (SERP) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Saved Search / Alerts with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in B2C Web Application.
Introduced workflow updates in iOS Application.
Introduced workflow updates in Android Application.

items.title: Pro Agency Platform Initiative
items.description: Pro Agency Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Median first response time and Visibility attach rate, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Pro Tool Foundation. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease median first response time by improving pro tool foundation and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Decrease cost per closed side by improving pro tool foundation and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase visibility attach rate by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase b2b arr by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase duplicate / missing listing incidence by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease issue resolution time by improving pro tool foundation and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase revenue per active integration partner by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase downstream monetized supply by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Pro Tool Foundation with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Online Classifieds Acquisition with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Classifieds Performance Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Classifieds Visibility Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Pro Portal.
Introduced workflow updates in Listing Ingestion API.
Introduced workflow updates in CRM Integration API.
